title: Crispy Irish Feta Fried Rice
description: A funky, creamy fried rice that pairs the tang of feta with a double-fry KFC style crisp, perfect for a sick-day Irish lunch that's macrobiotic-friendly.

ingredients.name: cooked jasmine rice
ingredients.notes: use day-old rice for best texture

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and scramble the beaten eggs until just set, then set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil to the skillet and sauté diced onion until translucent.
Add diced carrots and peas, stir-frying for 3 minutes until slightly tender.
Pour in cooked rice, breaking up clumps, and stir-fry for 5 minutes, allowing it to heat through.
Stir in soy sauce, maple syrup, and paprika, tossing until the rice is evenly coated.
Fold in the scrambled eggs and crumbled feta, mixing gently to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and let the rice steam for 5 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Finish by sprinkling additional paprika for color and serving hot.
